answers.label: Undergraduate (studying for or completed a Bachelor's)
I like creating, designing, or making things
Remote or flexible — I work best independently
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

milestones.title: Degree / Formal Education
milestones.description: Enroll in and complete a bachelor's degree relevant to commercial pilot (focus on coursework covering cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations)

resources.title: College of Aviation Technology - Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport (AASTMT)
EgyptAir Training Academy - Commercial Pilot License Programs
Aerospace Engineering Department - Faculty of Engineering - Cairo University
Egyptian Ministry of Civil Aviation - Official Portal

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in cpl/ir licence operations, vfr and ifr flight operations, and aircraft systems knowledge — these are the essential building blocks for a commercial pilot

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in flight planning and fuel management, emergency procedures, and navigation and meteorology, applying them through exercises and case studies

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing supervised driving or operating sessions, route planning, and practical navigation exercises — focus on applying cpl/ir licence operations, and vfr and ifr flight operations in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to commercial pilot

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your commercial pilot skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for commercial pilot positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
